content.problemStatement:
Write a program to check whether the given number N is N-Series `(Disarium)` number or not.

(Eg. 135 is N-Series Number because 1¹ + 3² + 5³ = 135 and some others are 89, 175, 518 etc.)


Input Format
A single integer `N` (1 ≤ N ≤ 10000)



Output Format
Print `"Yes"` if the number is an N-Series (Disarium) number, else print `"No"`.
